export_parity_gate.command: node --input-type=module import current src/workflow/requirement-intake.js exports and compare against artifact after.public_exports

extracted_domains.src/workflow/requirement-intake-core.js: requirement intake constants, surface profiles, normalization helpers, profile selection, id/summary helpers, plan-review constructors, work-package ownership helpers, item normalization, and closed-status helpers
extracted_domains.src/workflow/requirement-submission-stat: requirement submission validation and project status submission state
extracted_domains.src/workflow/requirement-plan-review-sta: plan generation failure persistence, generated plan application, plan review approve/revise, and plan generation reset state
extracted_domains.src/workflow/requirement-lifecycle-state: requirement completion, failed closeout, and intake summary state
extracted_domains.src/workflow/requirement-intake-recordin: workflow event and artifact recording for requirement intake submissions

commands: node tools/run-with-node18.mjs --test --test-concurrency=1 test/requirement-intake.test.js test/workbench-server-requirement-plan-retry.test.js test/workbench-server-plan-review.test.js test/workbench-server-provider-execution.test.js test/workbench-server-requirement-closeout.test.js test/workbench-projection-project-management.test.js test/workbench-projection-project-management-dispatch.test.js test/autonomous-continuation.test.js test/project-status-continuation.test.js test/work-package-execution-governance.test.js
